items.name_cn:
【Genuine Leather】Bulk Stock🔥Marmont Series Half-Moon Bag#
 With Box🔥Model:699514▫️Size:21.5*11*5cm
The classic Marmont shoulder bag returns as a best-seller for all seasons. Featuring a crescent shape, the 3D embroidery on genuine leather is full and beautiful ➕ Solid brass hardware❗️The bag's contour fits the body's lines perfectly. Can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody. An incredibly high-value bag. It's simply a walking trendsetter!

items.name_en: 【Genuine Leather】LE 37 Mini Glossy Leather Bag New Arrival, Super Cute Bucket Bag with Handle_New Shape, made of Italian calfskin. The bag features a simple, structured silhouette that looks structured yet not too sharp. It has metal studs at the bottom and a classic iconic metal logo insert clasp. The overall look gives a unique temperament that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish!

items.name_en: 【Green】
items.name_cn:
【Green】
CALYPSO_ Elephant Calfskin Chain Bag
Made from imported Italian calf leather, it is soft and delicate to the touch. The classic Y logo, chain, and buckle eyes are finished in matte gold hardware. The bag features a magnetic four-clasp closure at the opening for excellent security. Inside, there is a zippered pocket for your phone and valuables; aside from this, there are no extra pockets, allowing for effortless use!
Size: 35.5×21×9cm
Model: 777399

specs.rawTitle:
【Green】
CALYPSO_ Elephant Calfskin Chain Bag
Made from imported Italian calf leather, it is soft and delicate to the touch. The classic Y logo, chain, and buckle eyes are finished in matte gold hardware. The bag features a magnetic four-clasp closure at the opening for excellent security. Inside, there is a zippered pocket for your phone and valuables; aside from this, there are no extra pockets, allowing for effortless use!
Size: 35.5×21×9cm
Model: 777399
